---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
::: {.hero-eyebrow}
African Bioinformatics Institute Training
:::

# Take part in training coordinated by the *African Bioinformatics Insitute*.

This site is hosted by the Interim ABI Training Working Group. Apply to upcoming training events and become part of the ABI community. 
<br>

[African Bioinformatics Institute Homepage](https://www.bioinformaticsinstitute.africa){.btn .btn-primary .me-2}
[About the ABI](https://www.bioinformaticsinstitute.africa/about-organization){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::


## Upcoming Training Events:

African Bioinformatics Institute - Bioinformatics Summer School

[Apply to the Bioinformatics Summer School](linktbcapplication page)

::: {.callout-tip}
Please get your managers/supervisors approval ahead of applying to ABI events.
:::
